message:
chore(beads): add HTTP/3 sub-epic and complete WebSocket testing notes

## HTTP/3 Sub-Epic (NEW)
Created missing HTTP/3 (QUIC) sub-epic (bd-2vik) with 5 task beads:
- bd-10y0: QUIC endpoint (quinn wrapper with Cx integration)
- bd-2tnl: QUIC streams (bidirectional and unidirectional)
- bd-1ows: HTTP/3 client (request/response over QUIC)
- bd-yeg2: HTTP/3 server (accept and handle requests)
- bd-ifn2: HTTP/3 E2E test suite

This was listed in the main epic but had no corresponding beads.

## WebSocket Testing Notes
Added comprehensive testing requirements to:
- bd-rww6: WebSocket client
- bd-18mg: WebSocket server
- bd-1bmj: WebSocket close handshake
- bd-3hn8: WebSocket split

## Platform Reactor Testing Notes
Added comprehensive testing requirements to:
- bd-2q5d: kqueue reactor (macOS)
- bd-39vt: IOCP reactor (Windows)
- bd-1gx6: epoll reactor (Linux fallback)

## Labels Fixed
- Added ecosystem-parity label to WebSocket sub-epic (bd-ku6n)

## Final Structure
- 7 sub-epics under main Ecosystem Parity epic
- 46 total ecosystem-parity beads
- No dependency cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
